data.title: Add CI platform matrix workflow for ticket-lib-api (Linux/macOS/Alpine)
data.description:
## Task

Add a CI matrix workflow that runs ticket-lib-api tests across Linux (bash ≥4), macOS (bash ≥3.2 default), and Alpine/BusyBox CI containers.

### New File: .github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml

Matrix strategy:
```yaml
strategy:
  matrix:
    include:
      - os: ubuntu-latest
        shell: bash
        label: linux-bash4
      - os: macos-latest
        shell: bash
        label: macos-bash3
      - os: ubuntu-latest
        container: alpine:3.19
        shell: sh
        label: alpine-busybox
```

Steps per matrix leg:
1. Checkout repo
2. (Alpine only) `apk add --no-cache bash python3 git`
3. Run: `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh`
4. Run: `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh` (created in prior stories)

Trigger: on push/PR to main when `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh` or `tests/scripts/test-ticket-*.sh` changes.

## Testing Mode

GREEN — CI workflow test; validate by checking yml syntax passes `actionlint` or yaml lint.

## File Impact

- .github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml (CREATE)

## Acceptance

- Workflow file is valid YAML
- Matrix includes all 3 platform legs
- Alpine leg installs bash + python3 before running tests
